implementation_summary.summary: CP00-712 extends the RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P06 review/closeout and P07 permission bridge descriptor over 150 planned units from RP23.P06.M09.S03 through RP23.P07.M05.S04 while preserving CP00-694 through CP00-711 as historical foundation evidence and keeping bank, card, WEHAGO, Douzone, tax export, DART, financial payload, credential, permission, audit, Hermes, failure recovery, and runtime surfaces closed.

commit_policy.commit_message: Close CP00-712 finance integrations P06 review closeout P07 permission bridge pack

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-712 RP23.P06.M09.S03-RP23.P07.M05.S04 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
